channel.title: Digital Campus - Release Notes
channel.description: Technology products managed by the Digital Campus team

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.9.0
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Amazon Signage Stick (ASS) dedicated player. Previously ran Amazon Fire OS player on ASS device.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.7.16
item.description:
ScreenCloud

Rollback release fixing issues introduced in v4.7.12. Released at 50% for Fire OS players alongside v4.6.30.

View release notes →

1Password

All Mac iOS

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.11.2
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Support for Amazon’s Remote Device Management (RDM) for Signage Sticks, including:Screen/TV mute and unmute via HDMI-CECScreen/TV power on and off via HDMI-CECDevice rebootScreenshot and full-screen captureDeep cache clearing (player app and Android system cache)Player app restartCPU and GPU...

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - June 26, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Weekly Recap - June 26, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Troubleshoot formula errors quickly with Gemini in Google SheetsWe’re excited to introduce a new Gemini in Sheets capability that enables you to diagnose and fix formula errors in one click. When you encounter a formula error, Gemini can analyze the surrounding data structure to help provide an...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new builds for 26 June 2026, retail launch of new WIP improvements
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, We have new releases today with builds across Beta and Experimental, and are excited to begin rolling out the new Windows Insider experience to retail Windows 11 builds this week! New Windows Insider Program changes The post Announcing new builds for 26 June 2026, retail...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Streamline your data backups with incremental exports for Google Workspace
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Workspace administrators can now utilize incremental exports when backing up organizational data. Instead of re-exporting their entire organization's data, admins can export frequent snapshots of their data into their organization’s own Google Cloud Storage (GCS) bucket.Key benefits include...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - You can now autofill a new design from an existing design that contains autofill data fields. The new Get design dataset API returns the data field na
item.description:
Canva

You can now autofill a new design from an existing design that contains autofill data fields. The new Get design dataset API returns the data field names and types for a design, and the Create design autofill job API now supports a create_from_design value for type that uses those fields to create...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Read Along in Google Classroom is now available to all education users to support foundational literacy
item.description:
Google Workspace

Read Along in Google Classroom, an AI-powered literacy tool that provides in-the-moment support to students as they read aloud, is now available to all Google Workspace for Education users at no cost. We believe this will open access to literacy tools for millions of students, and help educators...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Resubmit Withdrawn Documents
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now edit and resubmit withdrawn documents without starting over. Previously, withdrawing a document was a permanent action. If you n...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now accepts video data values, letting you autofill an image data field with a video asset. Autofilling a video is
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now accepts video data values, letting you autofill an image data field with a video asset. Autofilling a video is currently a preview feature.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New File Content webhook
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new webhook for File Content.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Update Clip share settings
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added a new API to update a clip's sharing settings.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New Workspaces webhook
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new webhook for Workspaces.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Stricter classifications for Google Groups to enhance data security and privacy
item.description:
Google Workspace

Earlier this year, we announced changes to Google Groups to enhance data security and privacy. The changes, which are rolling out now, include:Stricter “internal” and “external” classifications for GroupsClearer visual indicators for whether a group contains external membersChanges to how emails...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Updates to Gemini in Google Classroom
item.description:
Google Workspace

We are introducing several updates to the Gemini tab in Google Classroom designed to make its tools even more helpful for teachers. These changes make it easier for educators to collaborate with AI and create visual aids from any device, while expanding options for refining lesson plans.Mobile...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Scheduled Secondary Workflows
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now automate workflow actions based on dates, helping you send reminders, trigger integrations, and manage time-sensitive processes ...

View release notes →

item.title: NinjaOne - Bridge the Linux Gap with NinjaOne 14.0: Seamlessly Discover, Deploy, and Support Every Endpoint
item.description:
NinjaOne

NinjaOne’s 14.0 release expands on the platform’s unified experience, offering IT professionals unparalleled visibility and control across operating systems. These enhancements eliminate operational gaps with remote support, automated deployment, and data protection all in one interface. Explore...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 7.1.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Add support for I420Limited and I420Full; add support for breakout room summaries; provide ROI for face in raw video data; support on-demand avatar download.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 7.1.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Add callbacks and interfaces in zoom_meeting_participants_ctrl.js; add support for breakout room summaries; provide ROI for face in raw video data; support on-demand avatar download; fixed a breakout-room joining issue.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 7.1.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Add support for I420Limited and I420Full; add support for breakout room summaries; provide ROI for face in raw video data; support on-demand avatar download; fixed a webinar active-share issue with unsubscribing.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 7.1.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Add support for I420Limited and I420Full; add support for breakout room summaries; provide ROI for face in raw video data; support on-demand avatar download.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 7.1.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Add support for I420Limited and I420Full; remove zMacResRetina.bundle library; add AI Companion support in breakout rooms; provide ROI for face in raw video data; support on-demand avatar download; fixed a freezing issue when joining 800+-participant meetings.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Connect to Google Meet hardware with room codes now in Early Preview
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Meet users can now connect to nearby conference room hardware by entering a 5-character room code on their personal device. Meet recently launched Connect Room using proximity-based detection to identify nearby hardware. This update provides a reliable manual fallback when ultrasound is...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - The best AI is your AI. Brain² is here.
item.description:
ClickUp

The best AI is Brain². Guaranteed.Brain² is your company AI that self-improves, routes to the best models, and actually completes your work - creating websites, building slides, and managing projects. It's multiplayer AI where human intelligence becomes your collective Brain.Your context. Already...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Apps Script is now a Google Workspace core service with enterprise-grade data protection
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Apps Script is officially a Google Workspace core service. Covered under the Google Cloud Terms of Service and Google Workspace for Education Terms of Service, Apps Script now offers the same enterprise-grade data protection, robust administrative controls, and standard technical support...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Join Google Meet calls from Safari on iOS devices
item.description:
Google Workspace

Prior to this update, iOS users without the Gmail or Meet apps were unable to participate in Google Meet sessions on their mobile devices. Now, iOS mobile device users can join meetings directly through Safari, without needing to install an app. The process is now seamless; individuals without a...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Enhanced security monitoring with expanded Admin password reset alerts
item.description:
Google Workspace

In Alert Center, we are expanding the existing “Super Admin password reset” alert into a broader Admin password reset alert. Previously, this rule only triggered alerts when a super admin’s password was changed. With this update, the alert will now cover password resets for all administrator roles...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Create Linked Documents Without Leaving Your Current Document
item.description:
Kuali Build

We’re excited to introduce Inline Document Creation, a new way to create and link related documents while you continue working. This helps u...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Automatically Populate Editable Form Fields with Data Mapping
item.description:
Kuali Build

We're excited to introduce Data Mappings, a new feature that allows users to automatically populate editable fields in a document using data...

View release notes →

item.description:
macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Troubleshoot formula errors quickly with Gemini in Google Sheets
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re excited to introduce a new Gemini in Sheets capability that enables you to diagnose and fix formula errors in one click. When you encounter a formula error, Gemini can analyze the surrounding data structure to help provide an easy-to-understand explanation of the core issue alongside a...

View release notes →

Ad Astra

item.title: Zoom - Manage chat channel ownership and access encryption details
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added an API to transfer ownership of chat channels and enhanced the Chat Session Report API with an `encryption_info` response field for retrieving encryption-related details.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 5.6.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Improved the real-time audio translation logic.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 6.2.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: bug-fix, sdk-version | Client view retires the AI Companion brand, adds Phase 1 ultrasound signaling support for same-device My Notes restriction and fixes a bug where the onUserJoin function had stopped working. Component view optimized the "Join Meeting" process.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Expanded Zoom Phone APIs for call handling, settings, recordings, and voicemail
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added comprehensive Zoom Phone APIs for managing call handling, settings, custom groups, recordings, voicemails, and user configurations across common areas, call queues, shared line groups, auto receptionists, and users. Also enhanced reporting, monitoring group, emergency...

View release notes →

item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new endpoints to Workspaces API.

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new builds for 19 June 2026, version 26H2 for Experimental
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, We have new releases today with builds across Beta and Experimental, including Windows 11, version 26H2 for Experimental. Windows 11, version 26H2 Windows 11, version 26H2 represents our yearly second half The post Announcing new builds for 19 June 2026, version 26H2 for...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Weekly Recap - June 19, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

New discoverable space setting in Google ChatPreviously, spaces were either private (invite-only) or open (anyone in the organization can find and join). Discoverable spaces provide a new option between the two: they appear when users browse for spaces within their organization, but the...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Expanded language support for building and editing spreadsheets with Gemini
item.description:
Google Workspace

Earlier this year, we introduced new Gemini in Sheets capabilities that allow you to build and edit entire spreadsheets using simple natural language. We’re now expanding support for these features to 28 additional languages, enabling users who speak Spanish, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, Italian,...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Meet now available on Android Auto
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re bringing the power of Google Meet to your vehicle's display with our new integration for Android Auto. This update makes it easy to safely stay connected and handle important meetings hands-free from behind the wheel.Users can now access Google Meet directly from their car's dashboard. This...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Improved management of secondary calendars via the Calendar API
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re introducing two enhancements to the Calendar API that make it easier for admins to programmatically manage secondary calendars within their organization: a transfer API and a filter for secondary calendars owned by your organization.Transfer APIAs previously announced, the new endpoint in the...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now accepts a type field to support future functionality for different autofill sources. The first supported value
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now accepts a type field to support future functionality for different autofill sources. The first supported value is create_from_brand_template, which is the existing functionality for creating new designs from a brand template. For backwards compatibility,...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Release: Slack CLI v4.3.0
item.description:
Slack

Version 4.3.0 of the Slack CLI is here!

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Announcing the Slackbot MCP Client
item.description:
Slack

We're excited to introduce you to the Slackbot MCP Client, which gives you the ability to superpower Slackbot with your desired tools.

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - System notifications now delivered by "Slack" instead of Slackbot
item.description:
Slack

Slack system notifications (such as channel membership changes, User Group updates, Slack Connect alerts, and retention policy notices) are now delivered from the "Slack" system user (USLACK) instead of Slackbot.

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Reorder Table and Repeater Rows with Drag and Drop
item.description:
Kuali Build

We're excited to introduce a new way to manage data in Table and Repeater gadgets. Users can now reorder rows using drag-and-drop functional...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The preview Get design pages API now returns an id for each page, which can be used to correlate pages with per-page data from other APIs.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - Design responses now include a design_types field, and DesignPage responses now include a design_type field. These indicate the type of content a desi
item.description:
Canva

Design responses now include a design_types field, and DesignPage responses now include a design_type field. These indicate the type of content a design or page contains, such as doc or presentation. The value unknown is returned when the type cannot be determined. This list may be extended in the...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - New Block Kit data visualization block
item.description:
Slack

The data visualization block is now available for use with Block Kit.

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - Versions and Document Edit History Are Now Available to All Customers
item.description:
Kuali Build

We're excited to announce that Document Versions and Document Edit History are now available to all Kuali customers. Previously, these featu...

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now accepts data values for sheet data fields, which lets you autofill tabular data for sheet elements. Sheet data
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now accepts data values for sheet data fields, which lets you autofill tabular data for sheet elements. Sheet data fields are currently a preview feature.

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Publish brand template API is now available as a preview. It publishes a design as a brand template, creating a new brand template or updating an
item.description:
Canva

The Publish brand template API is now available as a preview. It publishes a design as a brand template, creating a new brand template or updating an existing one if the design is a draft of an existing template.

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - June 5, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

Please see the bu The post Announcing new Release Preview builds for...

item.title: ClickUp - Release Notes 4.04
item.description:
ClickUp

Gantt Baselines, Brain goes Mobile, ClickUp in ChatGPT, and More!This week's ClickUpdates brings Gantt Baselines to track how your project plans shift over time, the full power of Brain to your mobile device, ClickUp right inside ChatGPT, and more ways to customize how your meetings are captured.✨...

View release notes →

item.description:
PaperCut

Important upgrade information Version 25 includes significant updates, which may introduce breaking changes, new internet connection requirements, and mandatory updates for some optional components.Upgrading from version 24.x? Please review Important points to know about PaperCut MF version...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - Release Notes 4.03
item.description:
ClickUp

Google Drive Automations, Granular Capacity in Workload View, and Smoother Teammate Onboarding!This week's release automates work between ClickUp and Google Drive, provides more detail into team capacity in Workload view, and lets you onboard invitees to teams faster.✨ Automate Workflows between...

View release notes →

item.title: NinjaOne - Gain Better IT Asset Control and Visibility into Software Licensing With NinjaOne 13.0
item.description:
NinjaOne

NinjaOne’s 13.0 release advances IT asset management (ITAM) capabilities with software license improvements that offer greater cost visibility, usage history for custom licenses, and refined control over permissions and assignments. The platform now includes robust Lost Mode support for managed...

item.title: ClickUp - Release Notes 4.02
item.description:
ClickUp

Update Task Types in Views, Pin AI Notetaker, and more! This week’s release unlocks the ability to manage Task Types in Views, add date ranges to Gantt view exports, and so much more. Update Task Type Column in Your Views: Quickly see and update task types directly from your List and Table views....

item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - Enhanced Proof of Play (POP) with **Hourly Reporting**, giving all customers more granular visibility into content performance throughout the day. - Improved Proof of Play to ensure reporting data...

item.title: ClickUp - Super Agents: Release Notes Takeover
item.description:
ClickUp

Super Agents: The world's first human-like AI AgentsSuper Agents™ are personalized AI teammates that understand your work, use powerful tools, and collaborate like humans. Just describe the problem you want solved, the workflow you want to automate, or where you’re wasting time, and Super Agents...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - ⚡ Join us for a Super Agents AMA on Reddit!
item.description:
ClickUp

Hey, everyone!We’re excited to announce a special Reddit AMA (Ask Me Anything) with the ClickUp AI Team, all about our latest feature: Super Agents!🗓️ When: Thursday, January 22nd, 10am–12pm PST📍 Where: the r/ClickUp subreddit on RedditThis is your opportunity to connect directly with Michael Van...

View release notes →

item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to over the break and last week week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - **Secrets API: Credential Management** — IT Admins can now securely manage the lifecycle of API credentials using a centralized Secrets API. This includes creating, listing,...

View release notes →

item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🐞 Squashed Bugs - Fixed an issue where YouTube element showed an error due to recent changes in YouTube's Terms of Service. - Resolved a styling inheritance issue in Korbyt Create AI Layouts where elements did not...

View release notes →

Here's what we were up to this week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - Added audio volume control for media in Korbyt Anywhere PWA, requested specifically to be used for Microsoft Teams Rooms use cases 🐞 Squashed Bugs - Fixed display issues in the NWS Weather Element...
